runs.text: Order by Nov. 25th for Nov. 27th shipping!

With SO much to be grateful for this year,
this community is at the top of our list.

Thank you for letting us share the flavors of
Africa with you 😊

Always,
from our kitchen to your table.
No code needed. Valid through Dec 17th.
From our kitchen to your table.
Adùn (previously All I Do Is Cook)
